posts.author: lk_wizard
posts.text: Adding q4 fy26 updates- For the Q4 FY26 (ended March 2026) company posted following results Top-Line: Consolidated Q4 FY26 revenue surged by 19% YoY to ₹2,290 Crore. The CDMO Sterile Injectables segment alone grew by a 44% YoY, while Radiopharma grew by 10%. The Profitability Hit: Net Profit (PAT) plunged 21% YoY to ₹119 Crore. The Cause: This profit contraction was entirely driven by the Montreal CMO facility. Following an ‘Official Action Indicated’ (OAI) classification by the USFDA, Jubilant temporarily suspended manufacturing to initiate remediation. They absorbed a net exceptional charge…
